records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandfather. How have you been doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandfather. How have you been doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandfather. How have you been doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm doing well. It's difficult to write down everything that's happened so far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm doing well. It's difficult to write down everything that's happened so far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm doing well. It's difficult to write down everything that's happened so far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To summarize past events... I became the Saintess after getting out of there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To summarize past events... I became the Saintess after getting out of there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To summarize past events... I became the Saintess after getting out of there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't wish for anything to this extent, but I guess it's as you said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't wish for anything to this extent, but I guess it's as you said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't wish for anything to this extent, but I guess it's as you said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the order of knights I belong to...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the order of knights I belong to...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the order of knights I belong to...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is the haughty crown prince who is awfully prideful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is the haughty crown prince who is awfully prideful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is the haughty crown prince who is awfully prideful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The uncompromising captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The uncompromising captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The uncompromising captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only other girl who is so eccentric that I can never know what she's thinking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only other girl who is so eccentric that I can never know what she's thinking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only other girl who is so eccentric that I can never know what she's thinking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. And we're sorry for causing you so much trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. And we're sorry for causing you so much trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. And we're sorry for causing you so much trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. We have thoroughly inspected the area this time, so it should be over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. We have thoroughly inspected the area this time, so it should be over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. We have thoroughly inspected the area this time, so it should be over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, all of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, all of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, all of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, uh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, uh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, uh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a problem, Miss Martinez?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a problem, Miss Martinez?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a problem, Miss Martinez?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing. I am simply angry at the fact that I lost to the Savior once again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing. I am simply angry at the fact that I lost to the Savior once again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing. I am simply angry at the fact that I lost to the Savior once again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot believe he still killed more monsters even after going to help the Saintess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot believe he still killed more monsters even after going to help the Saintess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot believe he still killed more monsters even after going to help the Saintess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How pathetic. A Saintess of the Empire, suffering from lowly pests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How pathetic. A Saintess of the Empire, suffering from lowly pests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How pathetic. A Saintess of the Empire, suffering from lowly pests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you realize that you belong to the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you realize that you belong to the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you realize that you belong to the Knights of Redemption?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your Highness. Lucrecia tried her best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your Highness. Lucrecia tried her best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your Highness. Lucrecia tried her best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ask for your generosity and hope you excuse her this one time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ask for your generosity and hope you excuse her this one time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ask for your generosity and hope you excuse her this one time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is unlike you to contribute to the conversation like this, peasant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is unlike you to contribute to the conversation like this, peasant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is unlike you to contribute to the conversation like this, peasant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did something happen while you two were alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did something happen while you two were alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did something happen while you two were alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vPardon?
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vPardon?
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vPardon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-nothing happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-nothing happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-nothing happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed. It seems that a comic opera must have occurred while I was away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed. It seems that a comic opera must have occurred while I was away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed. It seems that a comic opera must have occurred while I was away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A comic opera?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A comic opera?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A comic opera?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! I assume nothing questionable happened in the presence of our sacred Saintess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! I assume nothing questionable happened in the presence of our sacred Saintess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! I assume nothing questionable happened in the presence of our sacred Saintess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I can already hear Allen nagging us for being late. If the preparations are complete, let us depart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I can already hear Allen nagging us for being late. If the preparations are complete, let us depart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I can already hear Allen nagging us for being late. If the preparations are complete, let us depart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Words cannot fully express my gratitude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Words cannot fully express my gratitude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Words cannot fully express my gratitude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you succeed in abolishing the Demon Lord and bring peace to this world once more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you succeed in abolishing the Demon Lord and bring peace to this world once more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you succeed in abolishing the Demon Lord and bring peace to this world once more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fret. As long as the Empire stands, we will not fail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fret. As long as the Empire stands, we will not fail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fret. As long as the Empire stands, we will not fail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, onward!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, onward!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, onward!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Savior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Savior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Savior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Lucrecia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Lucrecia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I truly appreciate the gift, but I was hoping you wouldn't mind me wearing it to next year's ball.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I truly appreciate the gift, but I was hoping you wouldn't mind me wearing it to next year's ball.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I truly appreciate the gift, but I was hoping you wouldn't mind me wearing it to next year's ball.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would like to mend the sacred garments... and dance with you again next year.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would like to mend the sacred garments... and dance with you again next year.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would like to mend the sacred garments... and dance with you again next year.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps we could come to Monte again, just the two of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps we could come to Monte again, just the two of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps we could come to Monte again, just the two of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything for you, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything for you, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything for you, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monte is likely to be restored by next year, so we should be able to perform the rite.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Monte is likely to be restored by next year, so we should be able to perform the rite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should head back as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should head back as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should head back as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And my Savior who cannot read the room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And my Savior who cannot read the room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And my Savior who cannot read the room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He probably doesn't even know how I feel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He probably doesn't even know how I feel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He probably doesn't even know how I feel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, just like how the salvation you wished for found me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, just like how the salvation you wished for found me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, just like how the salvation you wished for found me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will wish for something as well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I will wish for something as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the world is saved some day.
